name: Teriyaki Wing Dings
recipeInstructions:
1. Make marinade by combining all ingredients except chicken; mix well.
2. Rinse chicken drumettes well and drain on paper towels.
3. Place chicken in a shallow baking dish; pour marinade over all. Cover and refrigerate 6 hours or overnight, turning occasionally.
4. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
5. Arrange chicken on a rack in a baking dish lined with aluminum foil.
6. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, basting occasionally with the marinade.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
8. Delicious hot or cold.
